headline: 1 Profitable Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Brush Off
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".

raw.headline: 1 Profitable Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Brush Off
raw.summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".

headline: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order
summary: CBP told Court of International Trade Judge Richard Eaton that the total amount of IEEPA tariffs duties collected since last year is about $166 billion.

raw.headline: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order
raw.summary: CBP told Court of International Trade Judge Richard Eaton that the total amount of IEEPA tariffs duties collected since last year is about $166 billion.

headline: Assessing AutoZone (AZO) Valuation As Shares Hold Above Recent Levels Without A Clear News Catalyst
summary: With no single headline event driving attention to AutoZone (AZO) today, recent performance metrics are front and center for investors assessing the stock’s place in their portfolios and time horizon. See our latest analysis for AutoZone. The share price has held above $3,700, with a 1-day share price return of 0.67% and year to date share price return of 13.26%. The 1-year total shareholder return of 3.49% contrasts with a much stronger 5-year total shareholder return of 196.53%, indicating...
